contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Legal Entity Structuring — Governance & SVH Prep
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/509
  
  Details:
  One-hour governance session to finalize the DAO's legal entity structure ahead of the June 26 SVH Capital meeting.
  
  Outcomes:
  - Resolved three-entity stack down to ~$50 MVP (Wyoming UNA via OtoCo)
  - TrueTech Inc confirmed as independent entity (not DUNA subsidiary) — avoids UBIT
  - UNA needs no bank account — TrueTech Inc handles all money flows
  - TDG buyback mechanism clarified: TrueTech buys at NAV from operating cash, discretionary, formula on truesight.me
  - Howey question framed correctly (includes buyback feature as the actual risk)
  - Impact fund channel deferred until a genuine donation-type funder appears
  - SVH approach narrowed to one question: does TDG pass the Howey Test?
  - Final proposal document generated as PDF and merged to agentic_ai_context/main
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: LEGAL_ENTITY_STRUCTURING_PROPOSAL.pdf
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/LEGAL_ENTITY_STRUCTURING_PROPOSAL.pdf
